data.title: Del Monte Foods secures successful bidders in auction process for all business segments, focusing on quality food products.
data.description: Del Monte Foods has finalized asset purchase agreements for all its business segments, such as Vegetable, Fruit, Tomato, and Broth & Stock units. The company's priority is to maintain the production of top-notch food items during the transition period. This significant development was announced on January 15, 2026, in Walnut Creek, California.

data.title: BlackRock's total assets hit $14 trillion, revenue grew 23% to $7.01B, and adjusted EPS rose 10% to $13.16 in Q4 2025.
data.description: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) saw a surge in stock prices following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results. The company reported a 23% year-over-year revenue growth to $7.01 billion, surpassing the expected $6.69 billion. Adjusted operating income also rose by 22% Y/Y to $2.85 billion. Adjusted EPS increased by 10% Y/Y to $13.16, beating the projected $12.25. The revenue breakdown shows that investment advisory, administration fees, and securities lending revenue reached $5.28 billion from last year's $4.42 billion, driven by various factors. Securities lending revenue increased to $174 million from $161 million, primarily due to wider spreads. Investment advisory performance fees spiked to $754 million from $451 million.

data.title: Mount Sinai offers MRI-guided prostate treatment with TULSA-PRO®, preserving functions, first in Metro NY.
data.description: Mount Sinai is making strides in prostate care by implementing an innovative AI-powered therapy. This cutting-edge approach is aimed at preserving both continence and sexual function in patients. With an emphasis on patient outcomes and quality of life, this new therapy has shown promising results. By integrating artificial intelligence technology into prostate care, Mount Sinai is revolutionizing treatment options for patients, improving overall quality of care.

data.title: Bladex (NYSE: BLX) to hold Virtual Investor Day on March 24, 2026, established by 23 central banks in Latin America & Caribbean.
data.description: Announced on January 15, 2026, in Panama City, multinational bank Bladex (NYSE: BLX) founded by 23 central banks of Latin-American and Caribbean nations to enhance foreign trade and economic synergy in the area, revealed its plans.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet to host Q4 2025 earnings call on Feb 10 at 8:30 am ET. Leader in medical technology.
data.description: In Warsaw, Indiana, on January 15, 2026, Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a prominent medical technology company, revealed that their upcoming fourth quarter earnings conference call will be streamed online on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The conference call aims to provide insight into the company's recent financial performance.

data.title: World Business Chicago launches Dinner Conversations campaign during Chicago Restaurant Week 2026, Jan 23 - Feb 8. #EconomicFacts #BusinessFacts #JustTheFacts.
data.description: Chicago Restaurant Week 2026 is set to take place from January 23 to February 8, 2026. World Business Chicago will introduce an updated phase of its Just the Facts campaign during this period in order to highlight the city's key economic and business statistics. This initiative aims to showcase the most impactful numbers to the public, without relying solely on digital platforms.

data.title: HPQ Silicon and Novacium acquire IEC 62133 Certification for high-performance Li-Ion cells, a stride towards global commercialization.
data.description: HPQ Endura+ and Novacium lithium-ion cells have achieved IEC 62133 certification, affirming compliance with the top global safety standard for portable rechargeable batteries. Alongside UN 38.3 and UL 1642 certifications, this marks a significant milestone in ensuring their safety in transport and use. These certifications solidify their position as meeting essential global safety requirements.

data.title: PK Consumer Health (Avista Healthcare Partners, Damier Group) acquires Puhdistamo – Real Foods Oy, a fast-growing Nordic vitamins company.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, PK Consumer Health, a company backed by Avista Healthcare Partners and Damier Group, revealed its acquisition of Puhdistamo – Real Foods Oy, a rapidly expanding Nordic vitamins provider. This deal marks a significant move in the industry, demonstrating PK's strategic growth plans. The financial aspects of the agreement were not disclosed, but it signifies a major development for both companies as they aim to expand their market presence and offerings in the health sector.

data.title: ValueLabs, based in Hyderabad, India, will remain independent & founder-led after strategic review in Jan 2026.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on January 15, 2026, ValueLabs, a leading global company specializing in digital engineering and enterprise AI, revealed its decision to sustain its expansion as a founder-led independent entity. This determination follows the finalization of a strategic assessment process that encompassed consultations and evaluations.

data.title: Mantle integrates Infinex to boost global DeFi access, linking TradFi, RWAs, and on-chain liquidity.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 15, 2026 in Dubai, UAE, Mantle revealed that they have successfully integrated Infinex into their platform. Mantle, known for its high-performance distribution and liquidity layer connecting traditional finance, real-world assets, and on-chain liquidity, now offers users access to Infinex, a cross-chain DeFi aggregation platform. This integration is expected to enhance the capabilities of Mantle, providing users with greater opportunities in the decentralized finance space.

data.title: Morningstar introduces GenAI 20 Index (NASDAQ: MORN) for pure-play generative AI companies, tracking them from private to public markets.
data.description: Morningstar, Inc., a prominent provider of independent investment insights, unveiled the Morningstar PitchBook GenAI 20 Index. This pioneering benchmark, identified as NASDAQ: MORN, aims to provide investors with access to pure-play GenAI firms. It follows eligible companies from private markets to public listing, capturing their evolution. GenAI, redefining productivity and business models globally, is the driving force behind this initiative.

data.title: New England Donor Services achieves record with 1,692 organ transplants from 640 donors in 2025. #DonateLife.
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, New England Donor Services facilitated organ donations from 640 deceased individuals in 2025, leading to a new high of 1,692 life-saving organ transplants.
